912 PRNTRL_ADMSN_CD PRNTRL_ADMSN_CD K0520A1 Nutritional Approaches (Admission): Parenteral CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident performed parenteral/IV feedings days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
